name: 03_BBD첫확장
python_code: TP=(df['high']+df['low']+df['close'])/3; BU1=(TI.bbands(TP,20,2)[0]); BD1=(TI.bbands(TP,20,2)[2]); BU2=(TI.bbands(TP,60,2)[0]); BD2=(TI.bbands(TP,60,2)[2]); TargetLine = BU2.shift(1) * 1.002; cond=(df['high']>BU2) & (BD1.shift(2)<=BD1.shift(1)) & (BD1.shift(1)>BD1) & (BD2.shift(2)<=BD2.shift(1)) & (BD2.shift(1)>BD2); score=100
